title: Kubb Middleware Registry
description: Schema for the aggregated Kubb middleware registry. Each entry extends the per-middleware schema with NPM-derived stats and timestamps.

middlewares.description: Array of middleware metadata. Each entry is a per-middleware record extended with `stats`, `updated`, and `created`.

registryMiddleware.description: A middleware entry as it appears in the aggregated registry: the canonical middleware schema plus runtime-derived stats and publish timestamps.

updated.description: Publish date of the latest version on NPM (UTC ISO string).

created.description: Publish date of the first version on NPM (UTC ISO string).

stats.description: Runtime-derived metrics fetched from NPM and GitHub during registry generation.

stars.description: GitHub star count for the middleware's repository.

bundleSize.description: Unpacked package size in bytes (from the latest NPM version).
